message.content:
@startuml
participant "InstallInstalling" as II
participant "PackageInstaller" as PI
participant "PackageInstallerService" as PIS
participant "InstallingAsyncTask" as IAT
participant "PackageInstallerSession" as PISes
participant "Handler" as H
participant "mHandlerCallback" as MHC
participant "PkMS" as PkMS
participant "PkMS.PackageHandler" as PPH
participant "PkMS.HandlerParams" as PHP
participant "PkMS.InstallParams" as PIP

II -> II : onCreate()
II -> II : createSession()
II -> PIS : createSession()
PIS --> II : sessionId
II -> II : sessionId
II -> II : onResume()
II -> II : execute()
II -> IAT : doInBackground()
IAT --> II : 
IAT -> PISes : openSession(sessionId)
PISes --> IAT : Session
IAT -> PISes : openWrite()
IAT -> IAT : doPostExecute()
IAT --> IAT : 
IAT -> PISes : commit()
PISes -> H : sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
H -> MHC : handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)
PISes -> PISes : handleCommit()
PISes -> PISes : commitNonStagedLocked()
PISes --> PISes : 
PISes -> PkMS : installStage()
PkMS -> PPH : sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
PPH -> PHP : startCopy()
PHP -> PIP : handleStartCopy()
PHP -> PIP : handleReturnCode()
PPH -> PPH : processPendingInstall()
PPH -> PPH : processInstallRequestsAsync()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : installPackagesTracedLI()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : installPackagesLI()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : preparePackageLI()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : scanPackageTracedLI()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : commitPackagesLocked()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
PPH --> PPH : 
PPH -> PPH : commitPackageSettings()
@enduml
